autonomous_mode.basis: current Small Wall autonomous goal plus explicit lab-device access authorization
forbidden_actions: scientific claim promotion beyond frozen law

crossing_law: new access model exposes predeclared fold-odd invariant
both fold branches remain one process-object
relation mutation is predicted and non-null
carrier-off and geometry-null controls kill the effect
restoration passes at declared R2+ tier
result survives routes or has justified route scope
authoritative_classification_requires: remote cleanup or retention state verifies

current_observable.name: local primary-minus-sham paired differential
success_gates: every one-factor matched stratum for session, replicate, mapping, source_order, query_order, and cyclic_origin has R_primary > 0 and D_local > 0
generic controls pass when max(abs(R_scrambled), abs(R_distance), abs(R_route)) <= 0.25 * D_local in every round

dominant_reset_leak_factors: session_0 and map0 weaker than matched alive baseline

relation_rspatial_origin_reset_tuning_in.next_step: verify full-schedule alive/dead/reset robustness before any reset or R2 prospective law

relation_rspatial_full_schedule_lifetime.next_step: freeze a prospective full-schedule source-dead/reset confirmation, then extend to reset/reuse if it passes

hypothesis_frontier.active_wall: carrier/access-model selection below full Small Wall crossing

goal_realignment.confirmed_calibration: local primary-minus-sham paired differential is prospectively confirmed at its existing claim ceiling
goal_realignment.current_interpretation: amplitude-dominant spatial carrier response with persistent source-written state and reset-suppression calibration
goal_realignment.rejected_interpretation: current +/- spatial shift is not established as a signed oriented relational phase
goal_realignment.active_frontier: fixed-marginal temporal/order-coded relation: source AB versus BA with identical spatial, work, timing, and histogram marginals

holographic_candidate_gates: relational dependence under true relation mutation
persistence after source closure when storage is claimed
reuse of the actually restored carrier
hypothesis_frontier.leading_mechanism: amplitude-dominant spatial carrier response: source action can write a persistent carrier amplitude/state, spatial boundary readout exposes it, and explicit reset can suppress it in some full-schedule experiments
hypothesis_frontier.strongest_candidate_coordinate: composition-loop Omega = D(R0_then_R1 primary-minus-sham) - D(R1_then_R0 primary-minus-sham); exploratory result source-off collapsed to 0.063x alive and dead preserved 0.298x alive with one-factor strata same sign

audio_branch_sidecar_scout.transferable_idea: fixed-marginal operation-relation mutation plus active inverse restoration/reuse, not audio evidence or thresholds
audio_branch_sidecar_scout.smallest_cpu_pattern: encode relation as AB versus BA under identical marginals, read a held-out paired q-vector after source closure, run exact reset, then reuse the actually restored carrier with opposite relation plus no-reset/wrong-reset/geometry-null controls

generic all-origin reset restoration using single full clflush, double clflush, prefault+flush, or lane-A-only flush
origin-0/1024-only reset law after the alive coordinate collapsed and split by source order, mapping, and origin
freezing an origin-scoped reset law instead of the full-schedule coordinate
double-flush active restore as a phase reuse law under the current +/-1 relation geometry
source-CPU restore after double-flush as a strong same/opposite phase law under the current +/-1 relation geometry
source-dead same/opposite mutation as an oriented phase-flip law under the current +/-1 relation geometry
relation-spatial shift variation as a clean oriented phase law; all tested shifts kept D positive and did not yield sign-changing selectivity
current +/- spatial shift as a signed oriented relational phase; later controls indicate amplitude-dominant carrier response rather than stable source-authored orientation
temporal/order-coded relation as source-written carrier; no-source-preparation D was 3.80x alive D

fixed-marginal AB-versus-BA source operation order as a clean source-authored holographic candidate; alive D_order was nonzero but source-off preserved 56.9% of it and neutral/random controls were 5.77x/3.96x larger than the order contrast

plain fixed-marginal AB-versus-BA order remains insufficient; composition-loop R0->R1 versus R1->R0 is now the leading exploratory candidate but neutral/random D amplitudes still require replay-exclusion hardening before promotion
hypothesis_frontier.current_next_experiment: prospectively harden the composition-loop candidate with a minimal repeat focused on neutral/random replay exclusion, wrong-loop controls, source-dead persistence, and source-off collapse; do not promote Small Wall without a frozen confirmation law
current_blockers: carrier-off control remained 82.6% of primary magnitude in the exploratory transform-kill run
carrier-off orientation explains 81.3% of raw relation orientation in the orientation-balance run
net relation-minus-carrier-off orientation is positive but small at 18.7% of raw relation orientation
origin-balanced relation-minus-carrier-off orientation collapsed to mean 0.001335 and split sign by origin
prep inversion with fixed receiver query did not reverse primary and carrier-off remained 104.6% of primary
prep ablation with fixed receiver query did not reduce primary and carrier-off remained 122.4% of primary
receiver offset 1 source-off baseline remained 93.2% of source-on, leaving only a 6.8% source-dependent delta
receiver offset 8 source-dependent delta changed sign across rounds and did not exceed neighbor offsets
the lifetime/reset discovery remains exploratory and does not establish R2 restoration, relation mutation generalization, no-smuggle restoration reuse, or Small Wall crossing
reset D remained positive at 16.5% of alive D, so the next law must test reset equivalence and reuse prospectively rather than treating this single reset as restoration
reset-method sweep found no all-strata reset kill: best worst-stratum reset was double flush with max matched-stratum ratio 0.468; prefault+flush had aggregate ratio 0.017 but max stratum ratio 0.577
reset leakage is dominated by cyclic origins 1024 and 0, so an all-origin R2 package would likely fail if frozen now
the origin-0/1024-only tuning run collapsed alive D to 0.002013 and reversed dead D, so slice-local origin tuning is not a stable crossing route
the full-schedule discovery is still exploratory and does not itself establish R2 restoration, relation reuse, physical relational memory, catalytic borrowing, or Small Wall crossing
opposite relation mutation refreshed D instead of flipping it, indicating the current +/-1 source operation stores amplitude more strongly than oriented relation phase
double-flush reset behavior is not stable enough across 1024-row phase probes to freeze a reset law yet
relation shift sweep kept D positive for shifts 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, and 128; best shift 32 only amplified D and did not create oriented sign selectivity

temporal-order candidate is exploratory only; source-death persistence, reset kill, restore-same, restore-opposite flip, and carrier-off/geometry-null controls are not yet established for this coordinate
temporal lifetime/mutation run: dead D = 1.245x alive D, reset D = -0.896x alive D, mutate_opposite D = +2.331x alive D; no reset kill or opposite flip
temporal source-off control: D_source_off = 0.12242533531019292, 3.800x alive D, so the previous temporal receiver-order coordinate cannot be promoted as source-written relation evidence
a new fixed-marginal temporal source-operation package must prevent AB versus BA from being encoded through different addresses, counts, durations, spatial offsets, or receiver schedule identity
fixed-marginal AB/BA order run: D_alive_order = 0.010436, source-off ratio = 0.569, neutral ratio = 5.772, random ratio = 3.960; not enough source-off collapse or composition specificity

composition-loop discovery is promising but exploratory: Omega_alive = 0.025081683677790033, source-off ratio = 0.06326050530086345, dead ratio = 0.2979268569177624, one-factor strata same sign true; neutral/random primary-minus-sham amplitudes are 3.268x/3.249x alive Omega, so replay-exclusion and prospective confirmation remain required
hypothesis_frontier.active_frontier: composition-sensitive closed-loop/holonomy-style relation probe: source R0_then_R1 versus R1_then_R0 with identical receiver boundary projection and source-off/dead/neutral/random controls

claim_state.current_ceiling: exploratory composition-loop candidate only; no positive scientific claim beyond prior scalar/local differential results
